hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" == *.sh ]] && npx prettier --write --plugin "$(npm root -g)/prettier-plugin-sh/lib/index.cjs" "$file" 2>/dev/null || true
file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.sh ]]; then shellcheck "$file"; fi
file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.md ]]; then npx markdownlint-cli2 --config .markdownlint.json "$file"; fi
file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file" == *.ps1 ]]; then pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path '$file' -EnableExit"; fi
